task_completion.description: Log in and open the TB Treatment Card programme configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the DHIS2 interface (Maintenance app) with the 'TB Treatment Card' program selected or being edited.

task_completion.description: Create a notification named 'TB Case Enrollment Alert'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text field or list item containing the exact name 'TB Case Enrollment Alert'.

task_completion.description: Configure the enrollment alert to trigger on program enrollment and be sent to users at the organisation unit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for settings showing the trigger as 'Program enrollment' (or ENROLLMENT) and the recipient set to 'Users at organisation unit'.

task_completion.description: Create a second notification named 'TB Treatment Follow-up Reminder'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text field or list item containing the exact name 'TB Treatment Follow-up Reminder'.

task_completion.description: Configure the follow-up reminder to trigger 7 days after the scheduled due date and be sent to users at the organisation unit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for settings showing the trigger as 'Scheduled days due date' (or similar SCHEDULED trigger), a time value of 7 days (after), and the recipient set to 'Users at organisation unit'.

task_completion.description: Save both templates and associate them with the TB Treatment Card programme.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the program notification list showing both newly created notifications under the TB Treatment Card program, or a success message indicating they were saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the DHIS2 web interface to configure notifications.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the DHIS2 web GUI (e.g., browser windows, dropdowns, forms) rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The screenshots show the actual DHIS2 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the standard DHIS2 header, Maintenance app layout, and proper styling, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: No direct database manipulation or script execution to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open with SQL commands, curl requests, or Python scripts interacting directly with the DHIS2 backend.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target program is 'TB Treatment Card' (keyword 'TB'). Notification 1 must be named 'TB Case Enrollment Alert' with trigger type 'ENROLLMENT' (Program enrollment). Notification 2 must be named 'TB Treatment Follow-up Reminder' with a trigger related to 'SCHEDULED_DAYS_DUE_DATE' (Scheduled days due date) and a delay of 7 days. Both must be associated with the TB program.
